Objects.Name: [Module] Character Switch
Objects.Notes: A switch that checks the player's current character.

Classes.Name: PlayerSwitchCtrl
Classes.Notes: A switch controller that activates or deactivates SW_A when the player has selected the specified player character. By default, this switch only activates if the player is playing as Mario.

Obj_arg0.Name: Check Luigi?
Obj_arg0.Description: If set, the switch will activate when the player is playing as Luigi.

Obj_arg1.Name: Negate Output?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, SW_A will be deactivated instead.

SW_B.Description: If set, SW_A will not be activated until this switch is activated.

SW_A.Description: The switch to be activated or deactivated.
